########################################
Server Example: Dynamic Heightmap Unreal
########################################

Overview
========
Updates a heightmap height field and color map every frame to animate terrain. It is intended for RaisimUnreal visualization of dynamic heightmaps.

Binary
======
CMake target and executable name: ``dynamic_heightmap_unreal``.

Run
====
Build and run from your build directory:

.. code-block:: bash

   cmake --build . --target dynamic_heightmap_unreal
   ./dynamic_heightmap_unreal

On Windows, run ``dynamic_heightmap_unreal.exe`` instead.
This example uses RaisimServer. Start a visualizer client (RaisimUnity, RaisimUnreal, or the rayrai TCP viewer) and connect to port 8080.


Details
=======
- Creates a heightmap grid and updates heights and colors every frame.
- Uses visualization mutex locking while updating the heightmap.
- Intended for RaisimUnreal dynamic heightmap rendering.

Source
======
.. literalinclude:: ../../../../examples/src/server/dynamicHeightMapUnrealOnly.cpp
   :language: cpp
